get.summary: Returns all folders in a user's private playlist organization.
get.description: OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Returns all folders in a user's private playlist organization as a flat list.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: If specified, return folders for this user rather than for the authenticated user. The authenticated user must have admin role if this parameter is used.

post.summary: Returns all folders in a user's private playlist organization.
post.description:
OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Returns all folders in a user's private playlist organization as a flat list.

Requires OpenSubsonic extension name `formPost` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`).

username.description: If specified, return folders for this user rather than for the authenticated user. The authenticated user must have admin role if this parameter is used.
